summary: Gruber reviews the updated AirPods Pro 2 with USB-C charging case and a major firmware update bringing two new features: Conversation Awareness and Adaptive Audio. He finds Conversation Awareness too trigger-happy in urban environments but acknowledges it may work well for others. Adaptive Audio, which dynamically blends Transparency and Active Noise Cancellation, earns his highest praise as a near-magical replacement for plain Transparency mode. He frames AirPods Pro as Apple's true first augmented reality product, arguing they profoundly augment the aural world. The piece also reflects on how returning to the original AirPods Pro revealed just how dramatic the generational improvement has been.
key_points: Going back to first-generation AirPods Pro after a year with the Pro 2 revealed a dramatic, previously underappreciated quality gap in audio, transparency, and noise cancellation
Conversation Awareness is clever but impractical in urban environments where nearby strangers' voices constantly trigger it
Adaptive Audio dynamically blends Transparency and ANC so effectively that Gruber sees no reason to use plain Transparency mode anymore
AirPods Pro are Apple's actual first augmented reality product, augmenting the aural rather than visual world
The AirPods Pro 2 represent the best single expression of Apple as a company — simple, useful, and designed for how most people actually live
money_quotes: The best way to appreciate new technology is to go back to using an older version.
After a year as a near-daily user of AirPods Pro 2, I now find the audio quality of the first-generation ones to be thin and tinny.
Feel free to roll your eyes (or ears) at technology being described as 'magical', but damned if I can come up with a more apt adjective.
It just automatically Does What I Want™ in seemingly every context.
Vision Pro is not Apple's first product in the world of augmented reality: AirPods Pro are.

We humans are visual creatures and we naturally tend to think of augmented reality as a primarily visual experience, but AirPods Pro offer profoundly enjoyable and useful augmentation of the aural world around you.
They're far more than wireless earbuds — they're clever, powerful, delightful computers you put in your ears.
The new AirPods Pro are the best single expression of Apple as a company today.
key_insight: AirPods Pro 2 with Adaptive Audio represent Apple's most mature augmented reality product — not for the eyes, but for the ears — and the firmware update elevates them from great headphones to something genuinely transformative.
